title: Blocky Hotbar
description: Makes the hotbar more blocky and slots invisible! All other textures ar also invisible!!
body:
**Tired of the same old hotbar? Blocky Hotbar offers a unique approach to change your Minecraft hotbar! This resourcepack replaces the traditional hotbar with a visually distinct, more blockier hotbar. Enhance your Minecraft experience with a streamlined and visually appealing hotbar Gui.**


Other hobar textures:Transparent GUI and HUD By: VirxEC

*It only changes the bubbles, hearts, hunger, XP, Boss and armor Bars
**In newest versions xp and bubble bar are broken

I reccomend to use bare bones texturepack
